# Alpha document

Intro paragraph that sits before the first level-2 heading.
It should not become a parent on its own (extract_md only cuts on ## lines).

## Section one — quick brown fox

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This sentence is repeated to give
section one some body. Quick brown fox is a memorable phrase used in typing
practice and font samples.

## Section two — cosmic rays

Cosmic rays are high-energy particles originating from outer space. They strike
the upper atmosphere and produce showers of secondary particles detected by
ground-based experiments. Cosmic ray physics has informed our understanding of
both astrophysics and particle physics.

## Section three — pasta recipes

A simple cacio e pepe needs nothing more than pasta, pecorino romano, and black
pepper. Toast the pepper, emulsify with starchy water, fold in the cheese off
heat. Carbonara adds guanciale and egg yolks but skips the cream entirely.
